title: consolida oligantha
intro: Consolida oligantha, also known as larkspur, is a flowering plant in the borage family (Boraginaceae) native to the Mediterranean region. The plant is known for its medicinal properties, particularly in treating respiratory issues, such as coughs and colds, due to its expectorant and anti-inflammatory properties. The health benefits of Consolida oligantha include reducing inflammation, relieving anxiety and stress, and aiding in the treatment of skin conditions like eczema and acne. Herbal preparations of Consolida oligantha include teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be made by infusing the flowers or leaves in hot water or a solvent like ethanol.
